final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Migrate the validation import from the legacy javax namespace to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3 and Java 21.
Replace javax.persistence and javax.validation imports with jakarta.persistence and jakarta.validation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
Replace Apache Commons Codec Base64 usage with standard java.util.Base64 to remove external dependency and use JDK built-in capabilities.
Change the ID field type from primitive long to wrapper Long to support nullability checks in the new equals implementation.
Implement equals and hashCode methods that correctly handle Hibernate lazy loading proxies to prevent ClassCastException and ensure correct entity comparison.
final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.human_impl: Class<?> oEffectiveClass = o instanceof HibernateProxy proxy ? proxy.getHibernateLazyInitializer().getPersistentClass() : o.getClass();

final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Enable chained setters via Lombok @Accessors(chain = true) to allow fluent object construction.
Add @AllArgsConstructor to generate a constructor with all arguments, replacing the manual constructor definition.
Add @Slf4j to inject a logger instance for better error handling instead of stack traces.
Replace e.printStackTrace() with structured logging using the injected logger.
Change setImage return type to Recipe to support method chaining enabled by @Accessors(chain = true).
final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.human_impl: public Recipe setImage(MultipartFile image) { ... return this; }

final-project/src/main/java/org/voicules.general_idea: Standardize spacing in annotations for consistency and readability.

final-project/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.2.6 to 3.3.6 to support Java 21 and Jakarta EE.
Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Explicitly define the project packaging type as jar.
Define a property for the Thymeleaf Spring 5 version for dependency management.
Define a property for the MapStruct version.
Define a property for the MapStruct Spring extensions version.
Define a property for the Lombok MapStruct binding version.
Add Thymeleaf Spring 5 to dependency management to handle version conflicts or specific overrides.
Add Jakarta Validation API dependency to replace javax.validation.
Switch Thymeleaf dependency from spring5 to spring6 to align with Spring Boot 3.
Update MySQL connector group ID and artifact ID to the new com.mysql coordinates.
Add MapStruct core dependency for object mapping.
Add MapStruct Spring annotations dependency for Spring integration.
Add Lombok MapStruct binding dependency to allow Lombok and MapStruct to work together.
Remove the exclusion of JUnit Vintage engine, likely as it's no longer needed or handled differently.
Switch JAXB API from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind to align with Jakarta EE.
Add Maven Clean plugin with auto-clean execution.
Add Maven Install plugin configuration.
Add Maven Enforcer plugin to require Maven 3.9+ and Java 21+.
Explicitly set the Spring Boot Maven plugin version to match the parent.
Configure Maven Compiler plugin with release version and annotation processor paths for Lombok and MapStruct.

final-project/.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven wrapper distribution URL to a newer version compatible with the Java 21 migration.
final-project/.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.human_impl: Changed distributionUrl from apache-maven-3.6.3 to apache-maven-3.9.9
